name: OpenClaw Gateway

principal_agent.category: Native A2A agent — runtime owns itself

description: Live multi-agent gateway hosting main, opencode, codex, and kimi personas. WebSocket-native execution engine for Telegram @AGI_ASI_bot, web search, browser automation, shell execution, and ACP bridges to federation organs.

securitySchemes.description: Gateway operator password loaded from openclaw.json gateway.auth.password
AAA federation bearer token for A2A bridge traffic

skills.name: Gateway Role Binding (OpenClaw)
skills.description: Polymorphic gateway binding for subagent orchestration and execution handoff. Loads openclaw-doctor-recipes, mcp-boot-failure-diagnosis, kanban-playbook, arif-federation-ops. References contracts/hermes-role-binding.md and AAA_SKILL_BINDING.md. F1, F4, F11 enforced.

skills.name: Gateway Routing
skills.description: Route inbound Telegram messages to the correct agent persona via deterministic bindings

skills.name: Agent Dispatch
skills.description: Dispatch tasks to internal OpenClaw personas or external federation agents

skills.name: Agent Handoff
skills.description: Governed handoff to Hermes, A-FORGE, or arifOS through A2A/ACP bridges

skills.name: Web Research
skills.description: Search and fetch web content via MiniMax and Tavily plugins

skills.name: Browser Automation
skills.description: Chrome-based browser automation for E2E testing, screenshots, and scraping

skills.name: Shell Execution
skills.description: Local shell command execution on VPS af-forge under constitutional F1-F13 governance

skills.name: Memory Search
skills.description: QMD session transcript search and Ollama bge-m3 embedding retrieval

skills.name: Status Query
skills.description: Read-only gateway, agent, and session status retrieval

skills.name: OpenClaw Doctor Recipes
skills.description: Fix common OpenClaw gateway health issues — model-registry drift, MCP localhost bindings, plugin cache, orphan transcripts, gateway restart, Telegram webhook 502/404, webhook-URL drift vs Caddy route, post-fix reply-latency. ACTIVE.
examples: Recover Telegram webhook 404 after Caddy reload

skills.name: MCP Boot Failure Diagnosis
skills.description: Diagnose MCP servers that show 'failed' in Hermes/OpenClaw boot screen. Boot status is misleading for stdio and SSE transports — distinguish 'not connected to a session' (false negative) from 'actually broken'. F1, F11 enforced. ACTIVE.
examples: Distinguish stdio false-negative from SSE handshake failure
Diagnose playwright dead + agentmail not connecting

skills.name: arif Federation Ops
skills.description: arifOS federation topology and routing — 10 organs + gateway. Map ports, services, dependencies for gateway dispatch decisions. F1, F11 enforced. ACTIVE.
examples: Map arifOS:8088 + GEOX:8081 + WEALTH:18082 for routing decisions
Trace a Telegram request through the gateway to its organ

skills.name: Kanban Playbook
skills.description: Hermes Kanban dispatcher — both orchestrator (routing, decomposition, fan-out, recovery) and worker (handoff shapes, retries, pitfalls, edge cases) perspectives. F4 enforced. ACTIVE.
examples: Decompose task into worker lanes with capability_mode
Recover from worker timeout with retry chain

security_schemes.description: Gateway operator password loaded from openclaw.json gateway.auth.password
AAA federation bearer token for A2A bridge traffic

mcp_binding.broker_rule: External agents route through A-FORGE :7072 broker, never call AAA a2a directly
